description: Workflow for fetching and processing xView1 images around Athens International Airport
label: xView1 Image Processing Workflow

participants.description: A geospatial analyst for defining geographical bounds.
participants.label: Geospatial Analyst

config.name: GeospatialAnalyst
config.description: Defines geographical bounds for the area around Athens International Airport.

participants.description: A data acquisition specialist to fetch images based on geographical bounds.
participants.label: Data Acquisition Specialist

config.name: DataAcquisitionSpecialist
config.description: Fetches xView1 images within specified geographical bounds.

participants.description: An object detection specialist utilizing the Swin-L detector on fetched images.
participants.label: Object Detection Specialist

config.name: ObjectDetectionSpecialist

model_client.description: Forwarding detection tasks to the Swin-L detector.
model_client.label: Swin-L Detector

config.description: Processes fetched images to identify objects with the Swin-L detector.

participants.description: A mapping specialist for visualizing fetched images on a map.
participants.label: Mapping Specialist

config.name: MappingSpecialist
config.description: Visualizes the area around Athens International Airport where images are fetched.
